name: LandBridge Co LLC
summary: LandBridge was formed on September 27, 2023 as a Delaware limited liability company to serve as the issuer in an initial public offering of equity, which closed on July 1, 2024 (the IPO). LandBridge is a holding company, the principal asset of which is membership interests in OpCo. LandBridge is also the sole managing member of OpCo.
